pages.text: $(o)"Adept mages no longer argue right and wrong — they argue 'more right'."$()$(br2)The $(l)Buried Adept Court$() lies beneath desert sands — a sanctum where peers judged peers.

pages.title: Structure
pages.text: A $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() circle. The center sinks into a round assembly chamber. Walls carry the eighteen-element glyphs.$(br2)The entrance is choked with quicksand — breach from above.

pages.title: Loot
pages.text: Center of the chamber typically holds:$(br)· One $(l)warding-class$() scroll (Sovereign Aegis / Eclipse Veil / Unremembered Fog)$(br)· One $(l)Awakened Rune Stone$()$(br)· Occasionally a $(l)Leyline Conduit Stone$()$(br2)Desert nighttime mobs have made this place home — prepare to fight.

pages.title: Court Culture
pages.text: Adept mages convened monthly to cross-examine each other's casting records.$(br2)Those judged to be $(l)abusing the art$() were required to publicly destroy their own circle — not just punishment, but a ritual of magical responsibility.$(br2)$(o)"Only one who can break their own circle deserves to build a new one."$() — Court's catechism
